title: How does the Apple Watch water lock feature actually work? - Engadget
summary: It works while scuba diving as well if you have the Apple Watch Ultra, Apple Watch Ultra 2 or Apple Watch Ultra 3 , all three of which are safe for deep diving (standard Apple Watches are not).
